  • Field Details

    • analogDigitalDevices

      protected final SRSHub.AnalogDigitalDevice[] analogDigitalDevices

    • encoders

      protected final SRSHub.Encoder[] encoders

      protected final ArrayList<SRSHub.I2CDevice>[] i2cBuses

  • Constructor Details

    • Config

      public Config()

  • Method Details

    • setAnalogDigitalDevice

      public void setAnalogDigitalDevice(int pin, SRSHub.AnalogDigitalDevice device)
      configures an analog-digital pin to be analog, digital, or none
      Parameters:
      pin - the pin being configured, from 1 to 12
      device - the type of device on the pin
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the pin is not between 1 and 12, inclusive
      IllegalStateException - if init has already been called

    • setEncoder

      public void setEncoder(int port, SRSHub.Encoder device)
      configures an encoder port to be quadrature, pwm, or none
      Parameters:
      port - the port being configured, from 1 to 6
      device - the type of device on the port
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the port is not between 1 and 6, inclusive
      IllegalStateException - if init has already been called

    • addI2CDevice

      public void addI2CDevice(int bus, SRSHub.I2CDevice device)
      adds a device to an I2C bus
      Parameters:
      bus - the bus to which the device is being added, from 1 to 3
      device - the (unique) type of the device on the bus
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the bus is not between 1 and 3, inclusive
      IllegalStateException - if init has already been called or if a device of the same I2C address has been configured on the bus

    • lock

      protected void lock()
